RESERVE MY SEAT NOW

A MESSAGE FROM THE HOSTS

To: ALL SEO Agency Owners, Freelancers, and Entrepreneurs who want to experience MASSIVE business results in just 4 days

Hey future partner,

When we conceptualized WOSCon’23, we thought we were crazy! Here are two guys in a small city down south who wanted to launch the biggest SEO conference in the country.

At one point, we felt like giving up.. but what kept us going was our mission…

To gather all the SEO experts in the world and build a community that fosters partnerships, supports newcomers, and just celebrate the world of search!

This year, we’re inviting you again for bigger surprises, more networking opportunities, and a 4-day event that will take your business to an international level.

WE KNOW THE BENEFITS OF BUILDING GLOBAL PARTNERSHIPS

And we want you to bring these opportunities to YOU

So you can experience the same level of growth and support we did!

PLUS! Not only will you have the chance to network and partner with global entrepreneurs…

…but you’ll also get to learn from some of the biggest names in the industry. People you’ve only seen on YouTube!!

Whether you’re a beginner or an experienced SEO practitioner, or if you’re an entrepreneur or agency owner who wants to expand their own business with SEO, we invite you to 4 days of fun, learning, and community.

Right now, while you’re on this page, you can grab your ticket to The World of Search Conference 2024 for one-payment of just PHP 15,000 or $267!

For almost a fraction of the cost of most premium courses, you can have VIP access and learn face-to-face from some of the world’s most successful SEO entrepreneurs and marketers!!!

AND THIS TIME, WE’RE ALL ABOUT BRINGING YOU

Next Level Surprises!

RESERVE MY SEAT NOW

TOP 5 REASONS

YOU NEED TO JOIN US IN THE WORLD OF SEARCH CONFERENCE ’24

REASON ONE

Advanced Strategies

Be on top of the latest strategies and secret hacks, and what the TOP 1% of SEO experts are doing RIGHT NOW in their own businesses!

REASON TWO

Networking

Network with industry peers, experts, and fellow agency owners who are eager to collaborate and share resources with you!
REASON THREE

Global Partnerships

Connect with potential partners from all over the world who share the same goals as you -to grow your digital marketing business / agency
REASON FOUR

Community

Meet like-minded people who are equally as obsessed about SEO as you are. Find support, guidance, and community from peers who are on the same journey as you.

REASON FIVE

World-Class Speakers

Hear and engage with world-class speakers as they share their personal stories, experiences, and strategic insights on SEO, agency growth, and digital marketing.

After completing your main ticket purchase, you will have the option to upgrade into workshop seats.

Each workshop lasts 1-2 hours and has a capacity limited to the first 30 people who reserve a seat.

The optional upgrade for the paid workshops are available on September 26th and 27th.

SCHEDULE

ALL TIMES IN PHT (or GMT+8)

Sept. 26, 2024

(WORKSHOPS, MEET-UPS)

  • 10:00 am – 12:00 noon – Mini Meet-ups
  • 1:30 pm – 2:30 pm        – Steven Khanna
  • 2:30 pm – 3:30 pm       – Ryan Kristo Muljono

(WORKSHOPS, MEET-UPS)

  • 10:00 am – 12:00 noon – Mini Meet-ups
  • 1:30 pm – 2:30 pm        – Gabriel Valimento

(Main Conference Day 1)

MORNING

(Main Conference Day 2)

PLATINUM
SILVER

OUR EXHIBITORS

MEDIA PARTNERS

COMMUNITY PARTNERS

Frequently Asked Questions

DO YOU OFFER GROUP DISCOUNTS?

Absolutely! The more the merrier, right? The World of Search Conference offers group discounts to groups of 5 or more. Simply reach out to us at support@theseomovement.com to get the special discounted rate.

CAN I TRANSFER MY ACCESS TO SOMEONE ELSE?

We understand that sometimes life gets in the way and you just need to go deal with it. Should something pull you away from us, we are more than happy to transfer your registration to a coworker. Please note, however, that once your badge has been printed at the event, we cannot transfer it to someone else.

HOW DO I PAY FOR REGISTRATION?

You can pay via credit card or debit card. For other modes of payment, you may contact us at support@theseomovement.com

WHERE DO I GET MY RECEIPT?

You will receive a confirmation email when you register for the event. It may take us 24-48 hours to verify your payment. That should have everything you need. If you can’t find your receipt, email theseomovement@gmail.com

I CAN'T FIND MY CONFIRMATION EMAIL

Don’t fret! Sometimes our confirmation emails take a while before they land on your inbox due to verification. If you don’t receive your email within 24 hours, you may reach out to us via support@theseomovement.com

DO I NEED TO JOIN THE FACEBOOK GROUP?

Yes, every participant must join our event FB Group. We post event updates via the group. You can also exchange information  in that group and even gain new connections that can benefit your business.

MY CARD PAYMENT DIDN'T GO THROUGH. WHAT SHOULD I DO?

This is usually caused by the billing address not matching the card you are using to pay us with. If that isn’t the case it, please contact us at support@theseomovement.com

I'M STILL A NEWBIE. IS THE WORLD OF SEARCH FOR ME?

Yes. We recommend The World of Search to both beginners and advanced specialists. This will be an opportunity to not just meet, network, and connect with potential partners but also to upgrade your skills and your industry know-how.

I HAVE ANOTHER QUESTION

Can’t find the answer to your question here? Reach out to our support team at support@theseomovement.com

CAN I GET A REFUND IF I CANNOT SHOW UP?

Please find below our refund policy:

• You can cancel your ticket and receive a full refund if you email us your request within 24 hours of booking.

• Tickets are not eligible for a refund more than 24 hours after booking.

However, tickets may be transferred to another person so please contact us at support@theseomovement.com if you are unable to attend the event and we will be happy to find the best option for you.

2024 © THE WORLD OF SEARCH CONFERENCE | Manila, Philippines

Craig Campbell

CEO of Craig Campbell SEO

Craig Campbell is a UK based SEO consultant with over 20 years experience in the industry. Craig has gone from freelancer in his own home, to building up a digital marketing agency. And now mainly focuses on affiliate marketing.

JASON ACIDRE

Co-Founder and CEO of Xight Interactive

Jason Acidre is the Co-Founder of Avaris IO, an organic digital agency based in Quezon City, Philippines that specializes in Technical SEO, Content Marketing, and Digital PR. He’s also the publisher of Grit PH, one of the fastest growing online publications in the personal finance and business space in the Philippines. He’s best known in the industry for his blog – Kaiserthesage, where he shared the tactics and strategies he has learned over the years of spearheading SEO campaigns for some of the internet’s most competitive spaces.

Kasra Dash

A Leading SEO Consultant

Kasra Dash is a leading SEO consultant and the mastermind behind a premium brand that’s making waves across industries! He is an entrepreneur & investor. He invests in various digital assets such as websites, agencies & SAAS products. Together with James Dooley, Kasra Dash owns a rank and rent agency and more than 650 rank and rent websites.

Glen Dimaandal

Founder and CEO of SearchWorks.Ph

Glen is the founder of SearchWorks.PH, a beacon of excellence in the country’s search marketing landscape. Renowned as one of the Philippines’ foremost SEO experts and consultants. Glen has also been invited to talk at some of the world’s most prestigious search marketing conferences, including SMX West in San Jose, California, and Confluence in Oklahoma City, USA. With a wealth of experience as a former manager in two Fortune 500 US companies, Glen’s strategic vision and remarkable insights have propelled him to the summit of success.

Vaibhav Kakkar

Co-Founder RankWatch

Vaibhav Kakkar is the CEO and Founder of Digital Web Solutions an Agency with 350+ inhouse team and the Co-Founder of Rankwatch, an SEO software trusted by over 7,000 marketing teams worldwide. Spending 20 years in the industry, I sold my last business, Digital Next, to a listed Swedish company.Love Adventure, “Intentionally” been in a Category 5 hurricane, Certified Scuba Diver and love fast driving, in an alternate universe i would be a race car driver or a fighter jet pilot.

Jin Grey

Unlimited Affiliate Marketing

Meet Jin Grey, a seasoned SEO expert with 16 years of experience in the industry, specializing in affiliate marketing within the gaming niche for the past two years. Jin’s journey began with a passion for gaming and a vision to bridge the gap between gamers and their favorite products. With a wealth of experience in SEO, Jin has mastered every aspect from keyword research to content strategy, ensuring maximum visibility for her clients. Leveraging strategic partnerships with gaming brands, Jin has curated a diverse portfolio of high-converting offers tailored to gamers worldwide. Committed to integrity and transparency, Jin fosters genuine relationships with her clients, driving mutual success and growth in this dynamic industry. Join Jin on her journey to unlock the full potential of affiliate marketing in gaming.

Chris Walker

CEO Legiit.com​

Chris M. Walker, is founder and CEO of Legiit.com, a global platform connecting businesses with freelancers. With a strong business sense and digital expertise, Chris has not only launched successful ventures but also established Legiit as a trusted B2B hub. Chris’s prowess in digital marketing, especially SEO and content marketing, has helped numerous businesses thrive online. Beyond business, he’s dedicated to building communities and sharing insights to inspire others.

Russ Juson

CEO of I AM + Coaching

Russ Juson is a transformational leader and Life and Wealth Coach with over a decade of experience. In his humble beginnings, he started as a janitor, and he rose to become a Regional Sales Manager and retired at 35.

Founder of I Am + Coaching & Training Systems, Russ equips leaders with coaching skills to transform humanity. He has helped many corporate leaders and organizations develop a deeper level of awareness and create an impact to the world by starting with oneself. “It all starts with ME” is Russ Juson’s motto.

He’s an international life coach, trained in Singapore, San Diego, and MIT, and conducts seminars worldwide. As the founder of A-Quest Financial Coaches, he achieved top honors nationwide, emphasizing personal mastery and improvement. Russ envisions a world of abundance and tirelessly helps people unlock their potential for success. Join us to learn from Russ at the World of Search SEO Conference!

Vasco Monteiro

Co-founder of 'Journalist AI'

Vasco is a tech-entrepreneur building software companies through organic marketing channels.

Mitchell From

CO-OWNER of Authority Solutions

Mitchell From brings over 15 years of experience in the IT industry, having achieved executive levels in corporate America. Additionally, as a successful entrepreneur for more than two decades, Mitchell has made significant contributions to both the business community and non-profit organizations. His passion lies in educating others, where he shares insights and his expertise.

Currently, Mitchell serves as a founding partner at Authority Solutions®, a digital marketing agency specializing in web design, SEO, and content creation in the B2B space. Mitchell has firsthand experience helping countless businesses establish and safeguard their online brand, often centered around leveraging trademarks, copyrighted material, and other digital assets to establish an authoritative online presence.

Recognizing the critical role of intellectual property (IP) in the digital landscape, Mitchell emphasizes extending IP into the online world for brand enhancement, protection, and monetization. His unique perspective combines the legal process with digital marketing strategies, ensuring businesses maximize their brand exposure while safeguarding their assets.

Georgia Tan

Co-founder & Head of Search at Switch Key Digital

Georgia Tan is Co-founder & Head of Search at Switch Key Digital, a SXO consultancy helping businesses unlock explosive growth through a user-centric approach to SEO. This powerful approach combines SEO, UX and CRO to fuel untapped growth for businesses, and ultimately builds brands that connect, engage and convert. Georgia brings nearly a decade of SEO expertise from leading agencies including Prosperity Media and large Australian comparison sites including Finder, Reviews.org and WhistleOut, driving massive organic traffic and revenue for clients.

Niels Zee

CEO & Mentor - Traffic Family

Niels is the founder of Traffic Family – a 7-figure affiliate portfolio company in the Dutch affiliate industry. Leading the team, acquiring websites and achieving growth through all algorithm

From discovering Growth Hacking while walking through Silicon Valley, to being an in-house SEO that grew a website rom 5 to 11 million visitors in 3 months, to burning out and rising from the ashes as an CEO.

Niels will share his experience from SEO, Leadership, M&A, PPC, CRO, tracking and funnels so you can become a better, well-rounded SEO.

Jabez Reuben

Founder : linkvalidator.io & theblueprints.co

Jabez Reuben is the founder of linkvalidator.io and theblueprints.co and has spent over 8 years in the link-building industry. His agency’s primary goal is to craft diverse and secure backlink profiles for clients, ensuring they avoid any penalties from Google. They meticulously design strategies to boost clients’ online visibility while strictly adhering to industry guidelines. Jabez Reuben is recognized for his expertise in digital marketing, dedicated to fostering safe and successful growth for businesses online.

Alan Thomas

RevPact

Alan is the founder of APT Sales Consulting and RevPact. He helps agencies transform their sales process and win more deals. Alan Thomas is a 1x VP of Sales who has driven millions in Revenue for Fortune 500 companies like Twitter, High Growth SaaS companies like Time Doctor and seo agencies that want to scale.

Mayank Jain

Founder of Scalenut

Mayank is the founder of Scalenut, a tech-savvy business enthusiast who loves discussing growth, SaaS, and startups. With 15 years of experience and a team of AI copilots, he is on a mission to revolutionize the SEO industry.

At Scalenut, they have helped over 100,000 marketers globally scale their SEO game. They serve businesses of all sizes, from small startups to medium-sized enterprises to large corporations. Their cutting-edge AI technology automates the entire SEO workflow, making it simpler, faster, and more efficient.

Scalenut is proud to be a G2 leader in the overall content creation category for the last four quarters. Their team of experts is constantly pushing the boundaries of what’s possible, developing new and improved strategies that deliver real results for their users.

Christopher Palmer

CEO at Chris Palmer Marketing

Chris Palmer Marketing SEO is an internet marketing services agency and SEM training company. Specializing in SEO offering a full-service experience to businesses worldwide. Consulting and coaching digital marketing experts specializing in search engine optimization, social media marketing, paid search marketing, content writing, email marketing, reputation management, conversion optimization, automation and cutting-edge testing in all categories to provide optimal marketing & SEO results.

Angeline Licerio

Founder of SEO Tutorials Philippines

Angeline Licerio is the founder of SEO Tutorials Philippines, the country’s largest Facebook group for SEO professionals wanting to collaborate with other practitioners. She is also the creator behind All White Hat SEO, a course that teaches Filipinos how to do SEO the right way and charge premium for their SEO services.

Kevin Meng

Creator of Next-Level AI Content

“Kevin Meng is a copywriter in the SEO industry who specializes in high-quality content that improves reader engagement and conversions. He is the creator of Next-Level AI Content, a community dedicated to teaching people to use AI the write way to create informative, helpful content that readers love”

William Jones

Founder and CEO of Rank Fortress

William Jones is the founder and CEO of Rank Fortress, an innovative agency specializing in SEO strategies that deliver real-world results. With over 20 years of experience in the marketing and SEO industry, William has built his career on practical, hands-on techniques rather than industry theory. Originally self-taught, he has developed and implemented proven strategies that he uses daily within his agency and to train his SEO staff. Passionate about helping business owners achieve their goals, William challenges the traditional SEO approach, offering unique, effective methods that empower businesses to improve their online presence and achieve sustainable growth.

Alfredo Delgado

Founder and CEO of Purpose Mind Marketing

Alfredo Delgado is the founder and CEO of Purpose Mind Marketing, a specialized agency focused on local SEO that he established in 2019. Originally from Costa Rica and raised in Southern California, Alfredo’s journey is one of determination and growth. He began his career assisting individuals with resume writing and interview preparation, but driven by a desire to make a broader impact, Alfredo transitioned into digital marketing. Through Purpose Mind Marketing, he helps home-based entrepreneurs boost their online visibility via Google Maps optimization and strategic website enhancements. As his business grew, Alfredo partnered with William Jones, further strengthening his agency’s capabilities. He also developed his own software, Aldus, showcasing his commitment to innovation. Combining his diverse background with cutting-edge SEO techniques, Alfredo empowers local businesses to connect with their communities and achieve sustainable growth in the digital landscape

Jamie I.F

Founder Increasing.com

He has built large affiliate websites, scaled SaaS startups, and ranked for some of the most challenging affiliate and e-commerce keywords online.

Now, he shares his insights in the world of digital entrepreneurship with 8,500 people every month, helping others reach new heights.

With over $1 million in profit from SEO and affiliate marketing since 2020, he is also an investor and equity owner in several fast-growing SaaS startups.

Previously the marketing lead at Lasso, where he helped grow the business to tens of thousands in MRR within a year, he is also an investor in the UK’s fastest-growing personal finance content website, Up The Gains.

Additionally, he is the co-founder of QuizWizard, an AI quiz generator SaaS, and has made six figures in profit from selling on Etsy as part of a side project experiment in digital business.

With ownership of more than a dozen content websites, e-commerce, and digital product stores, he has spoken at several major conferences, including FinCon, Affiliate Gathering, SEOXclusive, and Charles Floate’s SEO Stream event.

Ryan Kristo Muljono

CEO of ToffeeDev

Ryan Kristo Muljono, the Founder and CEO of ToffeeDev and author of “Digital Marketing Concept,” is a seasoned Digital Marketing Consultant and Coach based in Jakarta, Indonesia. With over 10 years of experience, Ryan has been instrumental in helping business owners and marketers elevate their online presence. Under his leadership, ToffeeDev has collaborated with notable companies such as BCA, Indosat, Astra, Garuda Indonesia, and many others.

Gabriel Valimento

SEO Workout community Owner of Ameticia Digital Marketing

Gabriel C. Valimento, founder of the SEO Workout community and owner of Ameticia Digital Marketing, began his career in 2013 as a web developer. He gradually transitioned into an SEO specialist when he decided to become a full-time freelancer. With 11 years of digital marketing experience, Gabriel has significantly impacted the industry. At Ameticia Digital Marketing, he leverages his extensive expertise to drive client success, while the SEO Workout community, which he founded, serves as a platform dedicated to enhancing SEO skills and fostering collaboration among professionals. In addition to these roles, Gabriel hosts the podcast SEOKwentuhan.com, where he explores SEO trends and strategies. Currently, he also serves as the SEO Manager at GrowthTurn, continuing to contribute his valuable knowledge and experience to the field.

Steven Khanna

Head of Growth at Endorsely

SEO Sales Expert & Coach | Proven six-figure MRR generator. Master networker, building lasting relationships. Top closer in SEO. Transforming strategies into profits.
